# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

properties([
    parameters([
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Comma-separated list of artifact URLs to download'),
        string(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Comma-separated list of production servers'),
        string(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_PATH', defaultValue: '/opt/applications', description: 'Target deployment path on servers'),
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_CREDENTIALS_ID', defaultValue: '', description: 'Credentials ID for artifact repository (optional)'),
        string(name: 'SERVER_CREDENTIALS_ID', defaultValue: 'production-ssh-key', description: 'SSH credentials for deployment servers'),
        choice(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_STRATEGY', choices: ['rolling', 'blue-green', 'all-at-once'], description: 'Deployment strategy'),
        booleanParam(name: 'BACKUP_EXISTING', defaultValue: true, description: 'Backup existing artifacts before deployment'),
        booleanParam(name: 'VALIDATE_ARTIFACTS', defaultValue: true, description: 'Validate artifacts after download'),
        booleanParam(name: 'RUN_HEALTH_CHECK', defaultValue: true, description: 'Run health check after deployment'),
        string(name: 'HEALTH_CHECK_URL', defaultValue: '/health', description: 'Health check endpoint path'),
        string(name: 'SERVICE_NAME', defaultValue: 'application', description: 'Service name to restart'),
        string(name: 'SERVICE_PORT', defaultValue: '8080', description: 'Service port for health check')
    ])
])

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    environment {
        DOWNLOAD_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts"
        BACKUP_SUFFIX = new Date().format('yyyyMMdd_HHmmss')
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URLS?.trim()) {
                        error('ARTIFACT_URLS parameter is required')
                    }
                    if (!params.DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS?.trim()) {
                        error('DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS parameter is required')
                    }
                    
                    env.ARTIFACT_LIST = params.ARTIFACT_URLS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.join(',')
                    env.SERVER_LIST = params.DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.join(',')
                    
                    echo "Artifacts to download: ${env.ARTIFACT_LIST}"
                    echo "Deployment servers: ${env.SERVER_LIST}"
                    echo "Deployment strategy: ${params.DEPLOYMENT_STRATEGY}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Prepare Download Directory') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "rm -rf ${DOWNLOAD_DIR}"
                    sh "mkdir -p ${DOWNLOAD_DIR}"
                    echo "Download directory prepared: ${DOWNLOAD_DIR}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def urls = env.ARTIFACT_LIST.split(',')
                    def downloadedFiles = []
                    
                    urls.each { url ->
                        def fileName = url.tokenize('/')[-1]
                        def filePath = "${DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${fileName}"
                        
                        echo "Downloading: ${url}"
                        
                        try {
                            if (params.ARTIFACT_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()) {
                                withCredentials([usernamePassword(
                                    credentialsId: params.ARTIFACT_CREDENTIALS_ID,
                                    usernameVariable: 'REPO_USER',
                                    passwordVariable: 'REPO_PASS'
                                )]) {
                                    if (url.startsWith('s3://')) {
                                        sh """
                                            aws s3 cp ${url} ${filePath}
                                        """
                                    } else {
                                        sh """
                                            curl -u \$REPO_USER:\$REPO_PASS -f -L -o ${filePath} ${url}
                                        """
                                    }
                                }
                            } else {
                                if (url.startsWith('s3://')) {
                                    sh """
                                        aws s3 cp ${url} ${filePath}
                                    """
                                } else {
                                    sh """
                                        curl -f -L -o ${filePath} ${url}
                                    """
                                }
                            }
                            
                            downloadedFiles.add(fileName)
                            echo "Successfully downloaded: ${fileName}"
                            
                        } catch (Exception e) {
                            error("Failed to download artifact from ${url}: ${e.message}")
                        }
                    }
                    
                    env.DOWNLOADED_FILES = downloadedFiles.join(',')
                    
                    sh """
                        echo "Downloaded artifacts:"
                        ls -lh ${DOWNLOAD_DIR}
                    """
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Validate Artifacts') {
            when {
                expression { params.VALIDATE_ARTIFACTS }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def files = env.DOWNLOADED_FILES.split(',')
                    
                    files.each { fileName ->
                        def filePath = "${DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${fileName}"
                        
                        echo "Validating: ${fileName}"
                        
                        def fileSize = sh(
                            script: "stat -f%z ${filePath} 2>/dev/null || stat -c%s ${filePath}",
                            returnStdout: true
                        ).trim()
                        
                        if (fileSize.toInteger() == 0) {
                            error("Artifact ${fileName} is empty")
                        }
                        
                        if (fileName.endsWith('.jar')) {
                            sh """
                                jar tf ${filePath} > /dev/null
                            """
                            echo "JAR file validation passed: ${fileName}"
                        } else if (fileName.endsWith('.war')) {
                            sh """
                                jar tf ${filePath} > /dev/null
                            """
                            echo "WAR file validation passed: ${fileName}"
                        } else if (fileName.endsWith('.tar.gz') || fileName.endsWith('.tgz')) {
                            sh """
                                tar -tzf ${filePath} > /dev/null
                            """
                            echo "TAR.GZ file validation passed: ${fileName}"
                        } else if (fileName.endsWith('.zip')) {
                            sh """
                                unzip -t ${filePath} > /dev/null
                            """
                            echo "ZIP file validation passed: ${fileName}"
                        }
                        
                        def checksumFile = "${filePath}.sha256"
                        sh """
                            sha256sum ${filePath} | awk '{print \$1}' > ${checksumFile}
                            echo "SHA256: \$(cat ${checksumFile})"
                        """
                    }
                    
                    echo "All artifacts validated successfully"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',')
                    def files = env.DOWNLOADED_FILES.split(',')
                    
                    if (params.DEPLOYMENT_STRATEGY == 'rolling') {
                        deployRolling(servers, files)
                    } else if (params.DEPLOYMENT_STRATEGY == 'blue-green') {
                        deployBlueGreen(servers, files)
                    } else {
                        deployAllAtOnce(servers, files)
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Verify Deployment') {
            when {
                expression { params.RUN_HEALTH_CHECK }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',')
                    
                    servers.each { server ->
                        echo "Running health check on ${server}"
                        
                        retry(3) {
                            sleep(time: 10, unit: 'SECONDS')
                            
                            def healthCheckUrl = "http://${server}:${params.SERVICE_PORT}${params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL}"
                            
                            def response = sh(
                                script: "curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' ${healthCheckUrl} || echo '000'",
                                returnStdout: true
                            ).trim()
                            
                            if (response != '200') {
                                error("Health check failed on ${server}. HTTP status: ${response}")
                            }
                            
                            echo "Health check passed on ${server}"
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        success {
            script {
                echo "Deployment completed successfully"
                def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',')
                def files = env.DOWNLOADED_FILES.split(',')
                
                echo """
                    Deployment Summary:
                    - Artifacts deployed: ${files.join(', ')}
                    - Target servers: ${servers.join(', ')}
                    - Deployment path: ${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH}
                    - Strategy: ${params.DEPLOYMENT_STRATEGY}
                """
            }
        }
        failure {
            script {
                echo "Deployment failed. Check logs for details."
            }
        }
        always {
            script {
                if (fileExists(DOWNLOAD_DIR)) {
                    archiveArtifacts artifacts: "${DOWNLOAD_DIR}/**/*", allowEmptyArchive: true
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

def deployAllAtOnce(servers, files) {
    echo "Deploying to all servers simultaneously..."
    
    def parallelStages = [:]
    
    servers.each { server ->
        parallelStages[server] = {
            deployToServer(server, files)
        }
    }
    
    parallel parallelStages
}

def deployRolling(servers, files) {
    echo "Performing rolling deployment..."
    
    servers.each { server ->
        echo "Deploying to server: ${server}"
        deployToServer(server, files)
        
        if (params.RUN_HEALTH_CHECK) {
            echo "Waiting for health check on ${server} before proceeding..."
            sleep(time: 15, unit: 'SECONDS')
            
            def healthCheckUrl = "http://${server}:${params.SERVICE_PORT}${params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL}"
            def response = sh(
                script: "curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' ${healthCheckUrl} || echo '000'",
                returnStdout: true
            ).trim()
            
            if (response != '200') {
                error("Health check failed on ${server} during rolling deployment. Stopping rollout.")
            }
        }
    }
}

def deployBlueGreen(servers, files) {
    echo "Performing blue-green deployment..."
    
    def blueServers = []
    def greenServers = []
    
    servers.eachWithIndex { server, index ->
        if (index % 2 == 0) {
            blueServers.add(server)
        } else {
            greenServers.add(server)
        }
    }
    
    echo "Green deployment (first half)..."
    def parallelGreen = [:]
    greenServers.each { server ->
        parallelGreen[server] = {
            deployToServer(server, files)
        }
    }
    parallel parallelGreen
    
    if (params.RUN_HEALTH_CHECK) {
        echo "Verifying green deployment..."
        sleep(time: 20, unit: 'SECONDS')
        greenServers.each { server ->
            def healthCheckUrl = "http://${server}:${params.SERVICE_PORT}${params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL}"
            def response = sh(
                script: "curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' ${healthCheckUrl} || echo '000'",
                returnStdout: true
            ).trim()
            
            if (response != '200') {
                error("Health check failed on green server ${server}. Aborting blue deployment.")
            }
        }
    }
    
    echo "Blue deployment (second half)..."
    def parallelBlue = [:]
    blueServers.each { server ->
        parallelBlue[server] = {
            deployToServer(server, files)
        }
    }
    parallel parallelBlue
}

def deployToServer(server, files) {
    sshagent([params.SERVER_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
        if (params.BACKUP_EXISTING) {
            echo "Backing up existing artifacts on ${server}..."
            sh """
                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${server} '
                    if [ -d ${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH} ]; then
                        sudo mkdir -p ${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH}/backups
                        sudo tar -czf ${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH}/backups/backup_${BACKUP_SUFFIX}.tar.gz -C ${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH} . 2>/dev/null || true
                        echo "Backup created: backup_${BACKUP_SUFFIX}.tar.gz"
                    fi
                '
            """
        }
        
        echo "Preparing deployment directory on ${server}..."
        sh """
            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${server} '
                sudo mkdir -p ${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH}
                sudo chown \$(whoami):\$(whoami) ${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH}
            '
        """
        
        files.each { fileName ->
            def localPath = "${DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${fileName}"
            def remotePath = "${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH}/${fileName}"
            
            echo "Copying ${fileName} to ${server}..."
            sh """
                scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${localPath} ${server}:${remotePath}
            """
            
            if (fileName.endsWith('.tar.gz') || fileName.endsWith('.tgz')) {
                echo "Extracting ${fileName} on ${server}..."
                sh """
                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${server} '
                        cd ${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH}
                        tar -xzf ${fileName}
                        rm -f ${fileName}
                    '
                """
            } else if (fileName.endsWith('.zip')) {
                echo "Extracting ${fileName} on ${server}..."
                sh """
                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${server} '
                        cd ${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH}
                        unzip -o ${fileName}
                        rm -f ${fileName}
                    '
                """
            }
        }
        
        echo "Restarting service on ${server}..."
        sh """
            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${server} '
                if sudo systemctl list-units --full -all | grep -q ${params.SERVICE_NAME}; then
                    sudo systemctl restart ${params.SERVICE_NAME}
                    echo "Service ${params.SERVICE_NAME} restarted"
                elif [ -f ${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH}/restart.sh ]; then
                    cd ${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH}
                    sudo bash restart.sh
                    echo "Custom restart script executed"
                else
                    echo "No service or restart script found, skipping restart"
                fi
            '
        """
        
        echo "Deployment to ${server} completed successfully"
    }
}
